hero.subtitle: SavvyOwl automatically improves what you write, picks the best AI for the task, and shows you exactly what you spent. Create better content, faster and cheaper.

demo.subtitle: Before sending to the AI, SavvyOwl cleans up what you wrote — removes the fluff, improves the instruction, and the result comes out better. You don't do anything. It happens automatically.
demo.before_text: Hi, I'd like you to write for me a marketing copy-style text for me to post on my Instagram talking about how my followers can use artificial intelligence to create content for their social media in a more efficient and cheaper way, with a motivational and inspiring tone if possible
demo.after_text: Instagram copy: how to use AI to create social media content — efficient, affordable. Tone: motivational. Format: post.

howItWorks.step1_desc: Ask for anything in normal language. 'Write me an Instagram caption', 'draft an email to a client', 'give me ideas for Reels'. No special formatting, no technical commands.
howItWorks.step2_desc: What you wrote is automatically improved — clearer, more direct — and sent to the AI that will give the best result for that type of task.
howItWorks.step3_title: You get it and see the cost
howItWorks.step3_desc: The answer arrives in seconds. You see exactly how much it cost. If you liked it, save it to reuse later. No surprises on your bill.

benefits.card1_desc: What you write is improved before it reaches the AI. The instruction becomes clearer, and the answer comes out better. You'll just notice the result is better than usual.
benefits.card2_title: The right AI for each task
benefits.card2_desc: Not every AI is good at everything. SavvyOwl knows which one is best for what you asked — quick copy, long text, analysis — and sends it automatically.
benefits.card3_title: You always know what you spend
benefits.card3_desc: You see the cost of each request, per day, per month. Set a budget. If you're getting close to the limit, SavvyOwl warns you. Zero surprises.

ais.subtitle: Three AIs available today — for quick tasks, complex writing and strategy. And this is just the beginning.
ais.flash_desc: Fast and affordable. Ideal for everyday tasks: post ideas, captions, emails, summaries, translations. Answers in seconds.
ais.pro_desc: Powerful and precise. For when you need more: long articles, content strategy, detailed analysis, writing that requires nuance.
ais.claude_desc: Deep intelligence. Excellent for long, well-structured texts, complex reasoning, creative writing and strategic analysis with context.
ais.coming_soon: Coming soon: ChatGPT · DALL·E · Midjourney · ElevenLabs · and more. One interface for every AI you use.

audience.card1_desc: Captions, scripts, Reels ideas, post copy — ask in normal language and get answers you can use directly. No time wasted rephrasing.
audience.card2_desc: Quick replies to brands, content calendars, Stories copy. SavvyOwl helps you keep the pace without hiring an assistant.
audience.card3_desc: Multiple clients, multiple projects, one budget. See how much you spend per client, control costs, deliver faster.

cta_final.subtitle: Create your account in 30 seconds. No credit card required.
